goal:
Now make the same image-input behavior consistent for clipboard paste and drag-drop, without re-explaining 
 the architecture.
summary: Implemented immediate cleanup of temporary image files in both steer and normal submit flows when images are dropped
detail: Identified a resource leak where clipboard paste and drag-drop images saved to disk were not cleaned up if the model didn't support them. The assistant analyzed the code and realized both the 'steer flow' (lines 2697-2700) and 'normal submit flow' (lines 2741-2755) zeroed out image arrays without deleting the underlying files. The breakthrough was recognizing that `cleanupClipboardImages()` needed to be called immediately in both rejection paths rather than waiting for session exit. The fix ensures temporary files are removed right away when images are dropped due to incompatibility.
